svg.title: KD-tree, index time
svg.desc: All database vectors are recursively split at the median of one component per level: first x1 at the root, then x2 in each half. The stored tree consists of the median thresholds and four leaf buckets holding vectors x(1) through x(8).
svg.text: Index time — offline, once per corpus
the stored tree: median thresholds plus leaf buckets
each split: the median of one component xj over the vectors in that subtree
